evals.prompt: $imagegen 이 프롬프트 점검해줘: make a cool image for a fashion landing page, black jacket
evals.expected_output: Returns a concise prompt review with status, main issues, and an improved structured prompt. Does not generate an image because the user only asked for review.

evals.prompt: imagegen으로 웹사이트 히어로에 쓸 이미지를 만들어줘. 여름 신상 가방, 밝고 고급스럽게. 나중에 HTML에서 쓸 거야.
evals.expected_output: Uses the built-in image_gen path, strengthens the prompt with web hero composition, product constraints, no fake logos/readable text, and plans to copy the selected result into a project-local asset path.

evals.prompt: 이 제품 사진 배경을 투명하게 쓸 수 있게 만들고 싶어. API 말고 여기서 가능한 방식으로 해줘.
evals.expected_output: Chooses the built-in-first chroma-key workflow for transparent output, avoids API/CLI fallback, and asks for the source image only if no image is provided.
